title: Who A.GCareerSathi is for
content: A.GCareerSathi is built for Indian students in Class 10, Class 12, and Diploma stages who are choosing their next stream or career direction.

title: Assessment duration
content: The assessment is quick and student-friendly, typically around 10 to 12 minutes.

title: Report access price
content: The detailed report is unlocked with a one-time fee of Rs 9 and includes recommendations, steps, and scholarship pointers.

title: How it works
content: Flow: answer assessment questions, get AI-based analysis, and receive branch recommendations, next steps, and a downloadable report.

title: Data privacy
content: User responses are used to generate personalized recommendations and should be treated securely and privately.

title: Retry and dashboard
content: Students can revisit dashboard history, retry report generation when needed, and download completed reports.
